security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' https://extres.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost https://extres.localhost https://mv3report.localhost https: http: wss: ws:; img-src 'self' data: https: https://mv3report.localhost;

bundle.longDescription: Smallest host Tauri app that exercises tauri-plugin-extensions by loading the noop-mv3 fixture.
